description_en: Kengo (挙吾) merges 'raise/elevate' with 'myself'. Supremely active and ambitious, indicating a man who consistently raises his own standard.
Kensaku (健作) utilizes 'health/strength' and 'make/build'. Depicts a highly industrious, perfectly sound individual actively building a physically strong life.
Kensaku (健策) couples 'healthy' with 'policy/plan'. Denotes a massively capable planner whose mind and body are perfectly synced to execute great strategies.
Kensaku (兼作) uses 'concurrently' (Ken) and 'make'. Highlights incredible versatility, pointing to someone who brilliantly masters multiple disciplines.
Kousuke (拡輔) pairs 'expand' with 'assistant/guide'. Deeply supportive, showing a person with huge capacity to lift up others and steer them smoothly.
Kousei (興成) merges 'prosper' with 'become/succeed'. A highly auspicious name predicting massive growth, realization of goals, and lifelong success.
Kousei (興正) combines 'prosper' and 'justice/correct'. Points to a deeply principled individual who pushes forward positive, honest progress in the world.
Kousei (興生) connects 'prosper' with 'life/birth'. Overflowing with vitality and optimism, indicating a tremendously rich and abundantly growing existence.
Kouzou (興三) uses 'prosper' and 'three'. Exceptionally traditional, conferring massive active energy and upward momentum to a beloved third son.
Kouzou (光三) pairs 'light' with 'three'. Structurally flawless, visualizing a thirdborn child whose life is filled with brilliance and clarity.
Kouzou (光蔵) merges 'light' with 'storehouse' (Zou). Exceedingly robust and old-fashioned, aiming for immense accumulated wealth and luminous success.
Kouta (輝大) combines 'radiance' with 'large' (Ta). Superbly luminous and dynamic, wishing for perfectly boundless and shining potential.
Kouta (亨太) pairs 'pass freely' with the 'thick' suffix. Exceptionally grounded and auspicious, envisioning a healthy boy moving cleanly through life.
Kouta (興太) uses 'prosper' and 'thick' (Ta). An immensely energetic name, granting deep physical resilience alongside high-spirited growth.
Koudai (興大) pairs 'prosper' with 'large' (Dai). Staggeringly expansive, dreaming of immense success and broadly influential achievements.
Koudai (倖大) matches 'happiness/luck' with 'large' (Dai). Exudes perfect serenity and deep tenderness, promising a vastly fortunate life.
Koudai (光大) combines 'light' with 'large'. Impossibly grand and optimistic, representing a spectacularly bright presence that fills the entire room.
Kouhei (亨平) utilizes 'pass freely' with 'even/peace'. Highlights exceptionally graceful stability, meaning a life totally free of rough turbulence.
Kouhei (匡平) uses 'correct/assist' (Kou) and 'peace'. Deeply moral and stabilizing, depicting an individual who sets things straight and maintains harmony.
Kouhei (恭平) couples 'respect' with 'peace'. Represents ultimate social grace and humility, projecting a wonderfully calming, polite nature.
Kouya (興哉) blends 'prosper' with an emphatic particle (Ya). Inherently lively and extremely energetic, feeling like a perpetual shout of success.
Kouya (興也) pairs 'prosper' with the declarative 'ya'. Crisp, modern, and highly active, combining upward motion with a smooth phonetic finish.
Kouya (興矢) matches 'prosper' with 'arrow'. Staggeringly fast and direct, expressing ambition that launches immediately toward success without hesitation.
Kotarou (巨太郎) utilizes 'giant' (Ko) and 'thick/son' (Tarou). Amazingly large-scaled, wishing for the boy to grow into a truly massive presence.
Kotarou (库太郎) pairs 'warehouse' (Ko) with the famous 'Tarou' suffix. Very sturdy and secure, bringing a feeling of collected wealth and stability.

meaning_en: Bright robust son of the lake.
description_en: Kotarou (湖太朗) matches 'lake' with 'bright/robust'. Exceedingly rhythmic, painting a picture of an expansive, deep soul filled with bright cheer.
Kotetsu (虎哲) pairs 'tiger' and 'philosophy'. Phenomenally striking and deeply cool, suggesting a fiercely strong exterior hiding a profoundly wise mind.
Kotetsu (子鉄) utilizes 'child' and 'iron'. Very sharp and memorable, carrying immediate anime or historical energy via unyielding metallic strength.
Kotetsu (小铁) means 'little iron'. Widely recognized from pet culture and animation, signifying a tiny but completely indestructible spirit.
Gouki (刚基) matches 'sturdy' (Gou) with 'foundation'. Visually imposing, pointing to a man entirely built on absolute, unshakeable bedrock core values.
Gouki (刚希) couples 'sturdy/firm' with 'hope'. Tremendously passionate, wishing for ironclad resilience combined seamlessly with brilliant future goals.
Gouki (刚毅) doubles down with two characters for 'sturdy/resolute'. The pinnacle of pure unyielding masculinity and supreme martial-arts level toughness.
Gorou (五朗) uses 'five' and 'bright' (Rou). Extremely sunny, applying an overwhelmingly optimistic and clear feeling to a classic numeric naming structure.
Gorou (五郎) is the absolute standard for a fifth born son. Impossibly classic, bearing the humble, sturdy momentum of generations of history.
Gorou (伍朗) substitutes the standard five for the military 'squad of five' (Go). Extremely bright and historically grounded, suggesting a lively team player.
Sadaki (完聡) couples 'perfect/complete' (Sada) with 'wise/smart' (Ki). Supremely capable, pointing to an intellect that is perfectly rounded and flawless.
Sadaki (贞晓) uses 'chaste/upright' with 'dawn'. Extremely optimistic, visualizing an undeniably honest life that brings the breaking of new light.
Sadaki (贞彰) combines 'upright' with 'clear/reveal'. Highly distinguished, meant to carve out a massive, clearly highly moral path in society.
Sadao (完男) pairs 'perfect' with 'man'. Impossibly strong and uncomplicated, projecting the image of a fully-realized, perfectly capable male figure.
Sadao (贞生) matches 'upright' continuously with 'life/birth'. Wonderfully grounded, pointing to an intensely pure and steadily growing existence.
Sadao (贞男) literally means 'upright man'. Completely timeless and profoundly strict, desiring the absolute peak of moral male conduct.
Sadatsugu (贞嗣) uses 'upright' and 'heir' (Tsugu). Staggeringly traditional and aristocratic, carrying massive responsibility to uphold family honor.
Sadatsugu (贞次) pairs 'upright' with 'next' (often for a second son). Highly reliable, bestowing an undeniably correct moral compass upon a younger child.
Sadatsugu (贞统) matches 'upright' with 'ruling/overall'. Deeply powerful, meant for someone whose unshakeable morality qualifies them perfectly to lead.
Sadatoshi (真敏) combines 'true/real' (Sada) with 'agile/clever' (Toshi). Tremendously fast-thinking, suggesting a brilliant strategist grounded in uncompromising reality.
Sadatoshi (侦俊) links 'spy/detect' with 'genius/excellence'. Intensely observant and quick-witted, projecting massive intellect that easily reads any situation.
Sadatoshi (贞纪) uses 'upright' and 'chronicle/record'. Superbly precise, marking the writing of an unyielding historic legacy through perfect discipline.
Sadaharu (贞治) merges 'upright' with 'govern/heal' (Haru). Staggeringly calm and moral, indicating a leader who naturally maintains perfect, peaceful order.
Sadaharu (贞春) pairs 'upright' with 'spring'. Very balanced, bringing an energetic, youthful seasonal warmth to otherwise strictly principled kanji.
Sadaharu (贞仁) uniquely applies 'upright' and 'benevolence' (Haru). The absolute peak of morality, creating a flawlessly gentle and impeccably honest spirit.
